data.summary: [Triple Drop Campaign Preview] From 9/6 (Tue), Bounty & Schedule rewards will be tripled! Please not
data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

From 9/6 (Tue), Bounty & Schedule rewards will be tripled!
Please note that the campaign will start "After the Maintenance" when the day new client version is updated.

🗓️Period: After 9/6(Tue) maintenance – 9/12 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
